## Meeting Purpose

[Strategic session to discuss growth opportunities and SEO strategy for Innerwell](https://fathom.video/share/BaU_-WNBBAyJz9Ne7yamKLs7T8gkw5CJ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Focus on optimizing location pages to streamline customer journey and improve SEO](https://fathom.video/share/BaU_-WNBBAyJz9Ne7yamKLs7T8gkw5CJ?tab=summary&timestamp=78.0)
  - [Create a knowledge hub with educational content to position Innerwell as industry experts](https://fathom.video/share/BaU_-WNBBAyJz9Ne7yamKLs7T8gkw5CJ?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)
  - [Prioritize ketamine therapy content initially, but include all services in local SEO efforts](https://fathom.video/share/BaU_-WNBBAyJz9Ne7yamKLs7T8gkw5CJ?tab=summary&timestamp=652.0)
  - [Address site speed issues, particularly on the homepage (15s load time)](https://fathom.video/share/BaU_-WNBBAyJz9Ne7yamKLs7T8gkw5CJ?tab=summary&timestamp=67.0)

## Topics

### Location Page Optimization

  - [Revamp location pages to summarize all available services in each state](https://fathom.video/share/BaU_-WNBBAyJz9Ne7yamKLs7T8gkw5CJ?tab=summary&timestamp=102.0)
  - [Link location pages to service pages and clinician listings](https://fathom.video/share/BaU_-WNBBAyJz9Ne7yamKLs7T8gkw5CJ?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Implement a "join waitlist" feature for unavailable services](https://fathom.video/share/BaU_-WNBBAyJz9Ne7yamKLs7T8gkw5CJ?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Create a seamless flow from state-level pages to city-level pages and clinician information](https://fathom.video/share/BaU_-WNBBAyJz9Ne7yamKLs7T8gkw5CJ?tab=summary&timestamp=127.0)

### Knowledge Hub Development

  - [Create educational content in a blog-like format with a more formal tone](https://fathom.video/share/BaU_-WNBBAyJz9Ne7yamKLs7T8gkw5CJ?tab=summary&timestamp=375.0)
  - [Focus on symptom-based and condition-based content](https://fathom.video/share/BaU_-WNBBAyJz9Ne7yamKLs7T8gkw5CJ?tab=summary&timestamp=410.0)
  - [Explore compatibility between treatments, demographic-specific information, and post-care recommendations](https://fathom.video/share/BaU_-WNBBAyJz9Ne7yamKLs7T8gkw5CJ?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Ensure clinical accuracy through review process (new head of operations to support)](https://fathom.video/share/BaU_-WNBBAyJz9Ne7yamKLs7T8gkw5CJ?tab=summary&timestamp=454.0)

### SEO Improvements

  - [Optimize meta descriptions and tags](https://fathom.video/share/BaU_-WNBBAyJz9Ne7yamKLs7T8gkw5CJ?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Enhance internal linking structure](https://fathom.video/share/BaU_-WNBBAyJz9Ne7yamKLs7T8gkw5CJ?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)
  - Implement FAQ sections on relevant pages
  - [Focus on local SEO strategies](https://fathom.video/share/BaU_-WNBBAyJz9Ne7yamKLs7T8gkw5CJ?tab=summary&timestamp=78.0)
  - [Refresh existing content as needed](https://fathom.video/share/BaU_-WNBBAyJz9Ne7yamKLs7T8gkw5CJ?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)

### Technical Improvements

  - [Address slow page speed (currently 15s load time on homepage)](https://fathom.video/share/BaU_-WNBBAyJz9Ne7yamKLs7T8gkw5CJ?tab=summary&timestamp=67.0)
  - [Ensure mobile-friendliness across the site](https://fathom.video/share/BaU_-WNBBAyJz9Ne7yamKLs7T8gkw5CJ?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Investigate image optimization, particularly for the homepage hero image](https://fathom.video/share/BaU_-WNBBAyJz9Ne7yamKLs7T8gkw5CJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1100.0)

### Link Building Strategy

  - [Leverage existing customer base for initial internal links](https://fathom.video/share/BaU_-WNBBAyJz9Ne7yamKLs7T8gkw5CJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1411.0)
  - [Scale outreach efforts through Jimmy's work](https://fathom.video/share/BaU_-WNBBAyJz9Ne7yamKLs7T8gkw5CJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1411.0)
  - [Explore potential content collaboration opportunities in the future](https://fathom.video/share/BaU_-WNBBAyJz9Ne7yamKLs7T8gkw5CJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1465.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to create wireframes and templates for optimized location pages](https://fathom.video/share/BaU_-WNBBAyJz9Ne7yamKLs7T8gkw5CJ?tab=summary&timestamp=915.0)
  - [Innerwell to review and provide feedback on proposed page structures](https://fathom.video/share/BaU_-WNBBAyJz9Ne7yamKLs7T8gkw5CJ?tab=summary&timestamp=924.0)
  - [GrowthX to begin content creation for knowledge hub](https://fathom.video/share/BaU_-WNBBAyJz9Ne7yamKLs7T8gkw5CJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1352.0)
  - [Investigate other service verticals (e.g., EMDR, talk therapy) for SEO opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/BaU_-WNBBAyJz9Ne7yamKLs7T8gkw5CJ?tab=summary&timestamp=692.0)
  - [Address site speed issues, starting with homepage optimization](https://fathom.video/share/BaU_-WNBBAyJz9Ne7yamKLs7T8gkw5CJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1083.0)
  - [Incorporate link building updates in future meetings](https://fathom.video/share/BaU_-WNBBAyJz9Ne7yamKLs7T8gkw5CJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1435.0)
